name: Ubiquiti G3 Starter Kit Pro
title: Ubiquiti G3 Starter Kit Pro
description: The Ubiquiti UniFi G3 Starter Kit Pro (UA-G3-SK-Pro) is a high-performance access control system designed for secure and seamless entry management. This kit includes a UA-Hub-Door, a UA-G3-Pro Reader, and two pocket keyfobs, providing a complete solution for professional access control needs. The system supports NFC, BLE 4.2, and Apple Touch Pass, allowing multiple authentication methods for maximum flexibility. Powered via PoE, it integrates seamlessly with UniFi Access, offering centralized management and real-time monitoring. With its enhanced security features, robust construction, and versatile installation options, the UA-G3-SK-Pro is ideal for corporate offices, co-working spaces, and high-traffic environments requiring efficient, modern access control.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Access Control Solution
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti UniFi G3 Starter Kit Pro (UA-G3-SK-Pro) is a high-performance access control system designed for secure and seamless entry management. This kit includes a UA-Hub-Door, a UA-G3-Pro Reader, and two pocket keyfobs, providing a complete solution for professional access control needs. The system supports NFC, BLE 4.2, and Apple Touch Pass, allowing multiple authentication methods for maximum flexibility. Powered via PoE, it integrates seamlessly with UniFi Access, offering centralized management and real-time monitoring. With its enhanced security features, robust construction, and versatile installation options, the UA-G3-SK-Pro is ideal for corporate offices, co-working spaces, and high-traffic environments requiring efficient, modern access control.

detailed_description.heading: Enhanced Security
detailed_description.text: The UA-G3-Pro Reader is a premium access control device that supports NFC, BLE 4.2, and Apple Touch Pass for versatile authentication. It features a built-in camera with a wide-angle field of view (H: 96.67°, V: 123.15°, D: 153.11°), capturing real-time visuals for added security. With a proximity sensor and an integrated microphone, the device enhances entry verification by providing an additional layer of authentication. Designed for outdoor use, it boasts IP55-rated weatherproofing, a polycarbonate and glass enclosure, and an aluminum alloy mount. The UA-G3-Pro Reader supports PoE power (48V DC) with a maximum consumption of 6W, ensuring efficient operation while maintaining robust security standards.

detailed_description.heading: Efficient Entry Management
detailed_description.text: At the core of the system, the UA-Hub-Door is a professional-grade access controller featuring five Gigabit RJ45 ports, supporting PoE++ (50V DC, 1A) for simplified deployment. It delivers up to 50W of PoE output, ensuring stable power supply for connected devices, while consuming 30W without PoE output. Built with durable polycarbonate and metal, it is designed for demanding environments. The kit also includes two NFC pocket keyfobs, allowing users to access secured areas with a simple tap. These compact and durable keyfobs provide a convenient alternative to mobile authentication, making access easy and efficient for employees, residents, or guests.

detailed_description.heading: Effortless Integration
detailed_description.text: The UA-G3-SK-Pro is fully managed through UniFi Access, providing intuitive user management, real-time access logs, and credential assignment via a centralized platform. Admins can configure NFC keyfobs, mobile access, and Apple Touch Pass credentials, ensuring smooth and flexible authentication. The system ensures encrypted communication and high-level security to protect sensitive access data. With PoE-powered components and multiple mounting options, installation is straightforward, allowing deployment in offices, commercial buildings, and high-security locations. Offering a seamless blend of convenience, reliability, and advanced security, the UA-G3-SK-Pro is the perfect solution for organizations looking for a scalable, next-generation access control system.
